settings.tagline: Crafting Bites of Joy for 85 Years

settings.heading: Welcome to Sweet Finds
settings.content: This is where Sconza overstock becomes your opportunity for amazing savings. Think of this as your chance to uncover hidden treasures—delicious treats at can’t-miss prices. But hurry! These sweet deals are here today and gone tomorrow.

settings.title: From Italy With A Dream
settings.content: Vincenzo Sconza lands at Ellis Island with $20 in his pocket and boatloads of ambition. The 17-Year Old Vincenzo settles in Oakland and begins work at a pasta factory with the dream of becoming a candy maker.

settings.title: Chasing The Dream
settings.content:
Vincenzo commandeers the family kitchen 
at night to try out his candy recipes. 
His heavenly peanut brittle becomes incredibly popular, and his candies are soon featured in local dime stores. Vincenzo quits his day job: Sconza Candy is born!

settings.title: The Dream Expands
settings.content: Sconza Candy thrives, adored by countless fans throughout the East Bay. Vincenzo dreams up and perfects new recipes in his kitchen, including Jordan Almonds, Jawbreakers and French Burnt Peanuts.

settings.title: New Generation, New Goodies
settings.content: Son Jim joins the family business, adding his inventive sweet tooth to the mix. Sconza acquires a local candy company. Vincenzo and Jim create nut and fruit-filled confections, after-dinner mints, and popular Christmas hard candies sold in decorative tins.

settings.title: Moving to Oakdale
settings.content: By now, grandchildren Ron and Janet are deep in the family business: a third generation of candymakers with exacting standards and distinct flavor ideas. Sconza moves to a bigger home in California’s orchard country, close to many prized local ingredients.

settings.title: Growing and Expanding
settings.content: Ron Sconza, CEO targets growth!  Expanding delicious confection selections to delight our customers and introducing new flavor-infused line of caramels and chocolate buttons.

settings.title: Celebrating 85 Years
settings.content: Our THINS platform launches and our packaged line rebrands to Bites of Joy. Sconza celebrates 85 years and the 4th generation starts to learn the business.

settings.heading: Sweet Surprises
settings.content: You never know what you will find!

settings.heading: Don't Miss Out! Stock up Now.
Minimizing our impact on precious Natural Resources
settings.content: In everything we do, we try to minimize our impact on the Earth. We locally source ingredients and our clean water discharge program contributes recycled water for local crop irrigation, crucial in drought-prone California. We recycle plastics and corrugated materials, follow clean air emissions standards, and are committed to continuous improvement of our sustainability practices. Many of our suppliers are neighbors, creating a community of food lovers dedicated to high-quality produce and land stewardship.

settings.heading: Children’s Guardian House
settings.content: Sconza Chocolates is honored to support the Children's Guardian House, which protects abused and neglected chilren in our local communities. Our company and team donate time, funds, and supplies to maintain and improve the Guardian House, established in 2022 to help at-risk kids heal and overcome traumatic family events. At Guardian House, children receive nurturing care, fun learning activities, delicious meals, fresh clothing, and individualized attention.
